summary: Iteration 6 testing complete. Verified parser improvements (Type column DR/CR, Debit/Credit columns precedence over duplicate Amount, signed Amount no regression), POST /api/transactions/reclassify, AppSettings GET/PUT/persistence + invalid-provider 400, POST /api/settings/test-ollama graceful unreachable, /api/categorize/suggest dispatch across all 3 providers (emergent/ollama/none) with no 500 when Ollama is offline. Frontend Settings page, sidebar nav-settings, and Re-classify button all function correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now 1185 lines — past the 700-line guideline. Recommend splitting into routers (settings.py, transactions.py, analytics.py, parsers.py) in a future refactor iteration.
Deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event("startup"/"shutdown") usage emits warnings; migrate to lifespan context manager.
_suggest_via_ollama is sync and uses requests.post inside an async endpoint — for true non-blocking under load, consider httpx.AsyncClient. Functionally fine for current single-user desktop scope.
test_iteration6 verified with module-level cleanup; no leaked TEST_ projects.

success_rate.backend: 100% (54 passed, 1 skipped xls due to xlwt absence — pre-existing)

seed_data_creation: TEST_Iter6 + TEST_UI_Iter6 projects created and torn down within tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 12 iteration_6 backend tests + full regression (54 total) green. Use `export $(grep -v '^#' /app/frontend/.env | xargs)` before pytest so REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL is populated. Ollama is intentionally NOT running in this env; settings/test-ollama and ollama-provider suggest endpoint must return graceful (non-500) responses — confirmed.
rca of the issue: n/a — no defects observed in iteration 6 changes
